page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.4xlarge is a general-purpose server instance powered by the x86_64 architecture. It features a dedicated Intel Xeon 8369HB processor operating at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The configuration provides 16 physical cores and 16 vCPUs, maintaining a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio. The CPU includes 32 KB L1d cache, 1.0 MB L2 cache, and 33 MB L3 cache, with support for advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 (including VNNI and BF16) and AES cryptography. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core. No local storage or GPU hardware is bundled with this instance type, and network connectivity is rated at a baseline bandwidth of 12 Gbps.

Benchmark evaluations place the instance in the average performance tier across multiple workloads. In stress-ng testing, the server achieved a single-core CPU score of 1575.19 and a multi-core score of 16609.17. Memory bandwidth tests show a read-only small block cached speed of 929.1 GB/sec, which drops to 97.46 GB/sec for large uncached blocks, alongside a large block write speed of 51.81 GB/sec. Data processing benchmarks recorded single-threaded gzip compression at 26.87 GB/sec and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression at 79.18 GB/sec. Database and web serving capabilities are highlighted by a Redis SET performance of 15.95 million operations per second and a static web serving throughput of 13.75 GB/sec.

From a resource density perspective, the 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio offers a balanced hardware profile for general-purpose workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities without hyperthreading resource contention, though the lack of local storage requires reliance on external network-attached storage, which may impact overall storage I/O latency. This instance is suitable for workloads such as database operations, static web serving, and multi-threaded data decompression tasks that benefit from dedicated Intel Xeon cores and AVX-512 instruction support.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor with 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs running at 3.3 GHz. It is configured with 64.0 GB of RAM, providing 4.0 GB of memory per core, and lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. The instance supports AVX-512 instruction sets and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. Benchmark results indicate average performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 16609.17, a Redis SET throughput of 15.95 million operations per second, and a static web serving speed of 13.75 GB/sec. The dedicated CPU allocation provides consistent compute power, making it suitable for database operations, web serving, and data processing tasks that do not require local NVMe storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth, suitable for database operations and web serving.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.4xlarge features 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps bandwidth for database and web serving workloads.
tagline: A dedicated x86 server with balanced memory and compute resources, optimized for consistent processing and network-dependent workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8369HB processor with 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs.
64.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio.
No local storage or GPU accelerators included in the default configuration.
12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for external data transfers.
Supports AVX-512 instruction sets for accelerated vector and matrix operations.
Suitable for database operations, static web serving, and multi-threaded data processing.
